name: zvideo_dd_startup_enumerate_default_select
description: zVideo_dd::StartupEnumerateAndDefaultSelect runs DirectDraw device enumeration, selects the first hardware API record by default, and clears the selected D3D device pointer.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 26 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 6 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the default hardware API record selection and cleared selected D3D device pointer after the enumeration wrapper returns.
